## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and action items.](https://fathom.video/share/ev54aP2RaEssenP4kQCFEkYsqVfnEaKs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ICP targeting and UTM tracking implementation are urgent priorities](https://fathom.video/share/ev54aP2RaEssenP4kQCFEkYsqVfnEaKs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to include more industry-agnostic lead magnets and dynamic CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/ev54aP2RaEssenP4kQCFEkYsqVfnEaKs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [February saw increased clicks/impressions but decreased lead conversions; audit needed](https://fathom.video/share/ev54aP2RaEssenP4kQCFEkYsqVfnEaKs?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [New weekly Monday sync to be scheduled for better action item follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/ev54aP2RaEssenP4kQCFEkYsqVfnEaKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)

## Topics

### Action Item Follow-up
